columns.name: FAKTAAR
columns.description: The financial year the invoice belongs to

columns.name: FAKTURA_TYPE
columns.description: Type of invoice (e.g., S for sales, D for delivery, K for credit note)

columns.name: FAKT_MERKNAD
columns.description: Remark or comment on the invoice

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: General comment related to the invoice

columns.name: FORSTE_LEVDATO
columns.description: The first delivery date associated with this invoice
